      • getGuardStr

        public java.lang.String getGuardStr()
                             throws CompilationException
        Get the guard as a string, used for serialization.
        Returns:
        The guard as a string, or an empty string if none exists.

        CompilationException

        public java.lang.String getVarStr()
        Get the variable list as a string, used for serialization.
        Returns:
        The variable list as a string, or an empty string if none exists.

      • getNextStr

        public java.lang.String getNextStr()
        Get the next variable list as a string, used for serialization.
        Returns:
        The next variable list as a string, or an empty string if none exists.

      • parseNext

        public void parseNext(java.lang.String identifier,
                      java.util.Map<java.lang.String,com.microsoft.z3.Expr> globalVariableMap,
                      java.util.Map<java.lang.String,java.util.List<java.lang.String>> identMap,
                      Location location)
               throws CompilationException,
                      java.lang.InterruptedException
        Parse an identifier and turn it into a list of variable assignments
        Parameters:
        identifier - The identifier
        globalVariableMap - The global variable map
        identMap - A map from identifiers to a list of the variables in them (L[$i] = L -> [$i])
        Throws:
        CompilationException
        java.lang.InterruptedException
